## Excluded Groups (with reason)

- Compliance: not applicable because ...
- Legal: ...
- Operations: ...
- Support: ...
- Security: ...

Excluded groups must say *why*. Silent exclusion is a defect.

## Stakeholder Map

A simple influence/interest matrix or a short narrative. Use whichever is
clearer for the engagement.

```text
                High Interest
                     |
         Keep        |    Manage
         Informed    |    Closely
       --------------+--------------
         Monitor     |    Keep
                     |    Satisfied
                     |
                Low Interest
       Low ----- Influence ----- High
```

Populate stakeholders into quadrants here.
